pathB.warning: N/A

pathB.title: Bouncy
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel bouncy. You have a surplus of light energy that wants to be expressed through movement and play. Your system is 'spring-loaded' for joy.
pathB.blueprint: Light Sympathetic Engagement. A playful state where the 'Vagal Brake' is released just enough to allow for rhythmic, bouncy movements without any threat response.
pathB.physicalSensation: A lightness in the heels; a desire to tap your toes; and a 'springy' feeling in your muscles, as if you are ready to jump for joy.
pathB.metaphor: A tennis ball dropped from a small height—hitting the ground and popping back up with effortless, repetitive energy.
pathB.theImpulse: To fidget playfully, to use 'animated' gestures, to joke, and to move with a little extra 'pep'.
pathB.superpower: Playfulness. This is the foundation of creativity. Your 'bounciness' allows you to look at problems as games and people as playmates.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel a fun internal 'spring'. Goal: Inner Rhythm.
pathA.body: Gently bounce your knees or heels while sitting. Feel the rhythmic pulse of your energy.
pathA.mind: The 'Joy-Jump'. Imagine yourself doing something fun and notice the 'bounce' it gives your mood.
pathA.social: Text a friend a 'bouncy' or funny emoji (🐰, 🦘) to share the playful vibe.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a playground. Goal: Sensory Interaction.
pathB.body: Stand up and do a few light, easy bounces on the balls of your feet. Let your arms be loose.
pathB.mind: Find 3 objects in the room that look 'fun' or 'colorful'.
pathB.social: Initiate a small, playful interaction—a wink, a quick joke, or a lighthearted question.

pathB.warning: N/A

pathB.title: Rising
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel a 'rising' sensation. You are moving out of a lower state and into a higher one. Your 'internal elevator' is going up.
pathB.blueprint: Ventral Shift. Your system is moving from 'protection' toward 'connection' or from 'rest' toward 'readiness'. It is the biological feeling of improvement.
pathB.physicalSensation: A subtle lifting in the chest; an opening in the throat; and the feeling that your eyes are looking slightly more 'upward' than before.
pathB.metaphor: A hot air balloon just as the burner is turned on—the fabric starts to fill, the ropes go taut, and the basket begins to lift off the grass.
pathB.theImpulse: To take a deep, satisfying breath, to stand a little taller, and to plan something for the near future.
pathB.superpower: Optimism. When you are rising, you are naturally tuned to hope. You can see the 'upward' path even in difficult circumstances.
pathB.generalGoal: Nurturing the lift. Affirming the progress.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel an internal 'upward' momentum. Goal: Conscious Rise.
pathA.body: Take a breath and imagine it lifting your chest toward the ceiling. Feel the expansion.
pathA.mind: Name one thing you are looking forward to, even if it's just a cup of tea later.
pathA.social: Say silently: 'Things are moving in a good direction.' Believe it for 10 seconds.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world looks more promising. Goal: Horizon Expansion.
pathB.body: Look up to where the wall meets the ceiling. Notice the 'high' space in the room.
pathB.mind: Find 3 things in the room that look 'upright' or 'growing' (like a plant).
pathB.social: Tell someone: 'I'm starting to feel better' or 'I'm feeling hopeful about [X].'

pathB.warning: N/A

pathB.title: Brimming
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel brimming. You are full to the edge with quiet joy. Your 'cup' isn't just full; it’s about to overflow in the best possible way.
pathB.blueprint: Saturated Ventral State. Your body budget is completely balanced and there is a surplus of 'safety' neurochemicals (oxytocin and serotonin) creating a feeling of emotional wealth.
pathB.physicalSensation: A 'full' feeling in the heart area; a constant, easy half-smile; and a sense that you are 'radiating' warmth from your core.
pathB.metaphor: A fountain just as the water reaches the very top edge of the basin—perfectly still for a second, then beginning to trickle over the side.
pathB.theImpulse: To share a kind word, to be generous with your time, and to linger in the presence of others.
pathB.superpower: Abundance. When you are brimming, you have so much 'good' inside that it naturally spills over into your actions. You are a source of effortless kindness.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel a rich, quiet joy internally. Goal: Core Savoring.
pathA.body: Place your hands together on your lap. Feel the 'fullness' of your own presence.
pathA.mind: Identify the one 'spark' of joy that started this feeling. Hold it in your mind.
pathA.social: Visualize yourself 'pouring' a little bit of this joy into a future task or meeting.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a place that 'belongs' to you. Goal: Shared Belonging.
pathB.body: Look around and mentally 'claim' 3 things you love about this space.
pathB.mind: Find a detail in the room that looks 'perfect' just as it is.
pathB.social: Offer a sincere, warm 'thank you' to someone, or just enjoy their company in silence.

pathB.warning: N/A

pathB.title: Smooth
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel smooth. Your system is moving with zero friction. You are alert, safe, and perfectly synchronized with your environment.
pathB.blueprint: Flowing Homeostasis. The sympathetic and parasympathetic branches are perfectly balanced, allowing for 'effortless action' and clear, calm cognition.
pathB.physicalSensation: A lack of 'tension-knots'; easy, fluid movements; and a sense that your thoughts are gliding rather than jumping.
pathB.metaphor: A luxury car cruising on a freshly paved road—no bumps, no noise, just a steady, high-quality forward motion.
pathB.theImpulse: To work steadily, to talk with a melodic tone, and to handle the day's tasks with 'easy' competence.
pathB.superpower: Grace. When you are smooth, you handle life's transitions without jarring. You are efficient, elegant, and effective.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel a lovely internal 'evenness'. Goal: Inner Flow.
pathA.body: Move your hand in a slow, 'infinity' (figure-eight) pattern in the air. Focus on making it perfectly smooth.
pathA.mind: Let your thoughts move like a slow, clear river. Don't grab them; just let them glide.
pathA.social: Enjoy the 'smooth' feeling of just being yourself. Say silently: 'This is ease.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels predictable and harmonious. Goal: Sensory Integration.
pathB.body: Run your palm over a smooth surface (table, fabric). Focus entirely on the lack of resistance.
pathB.mind: Identify 3 things in the room that look 'balanced' or 'level'.
pathB.social: Engage in a 'low-friction' interaction—a smile, a nod, or a simple 'all good'.

pathB.warning: N/A

pathB.title: Paralyzed
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel paralyzed. Your system has detected a threat so immense that it has chosen total immobility as your safest survival strategy.
pathB.blueprint: Total biological lockdown. The sympathetic drive to run is perfectly balanced by the dorsal vagal drive to disappear, resulting in a 'statue' state.
pathB.physicalSensation: A heavy, leaden feeling in the limbs combined with a high-frequency internal buzzing. Muscles are locked but high-voltage.
pathB.metaphor: A computer that has frozen mid-task with the fan spinning at maximum speed.
pathB.theImpulse: To stop breathing, to fix your gaze on one point, and to disappear internally.
pathB.superpower: The Ultimate Stillness. You are conserving every ounce of life-force by becoming a non-target.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are trapped in the internal gridlock. Goal: Tiny Motor Spark.
pathA.body: Wiggle just your right pinky finger for 10 seconds. Focus entirely on that one movement.
pathA.mind: Silently name the day of the week and the current month three times.
pathA.social: Imagine the face of a person who makes you feel seen. Hold their image for 5 seconds.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a dangerous, frozen photograph. Goal: Sensory Thaw.
pathB.body: Slowly blink your eyes three times, noticing the feeling of your eyelids closing.
pathB.mind: Locate one shadow in the room and trace its edges with your eyes.
pathB.social: If safe, lean your shoulder against a wall and feel the solid pressure.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Buried
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel buried. The weight of your environment feels like it is physically pressing down on you, and your system is huddling underneath it to protect your core.
pathB.blueprint: Compressive Freeze. A high-intensity state where the nervous system 'folds' under pressure. You are conserving energy by occupying the smallest possible space.
pathB.physicalSensation: A crushing weight on the chest and shoulders; shallow, constricted breathing; and a feeling of being 'sunk' into the floor.
pathB.metaphor: Being underneath a heavy, weighted blanket that you didn't ask for. It is quiet, but there is no room to move.
pathB.theImpulse: To curl into a ball, close your eyes, and wait for the weight to be lifted by someone else.
pathB.superpower: Structural Integrity. Even under immense pressure, your system is holding its shape. You are surviving the squeeze.
pathB.generalGoal: Space-making. Finding one cubic inch of room.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel crushed by internal heaviness. Goal: Expand the Container.
pathA.body: Place your hands on your ribs. Inhale slowly and try to push your hands out just one millimeter.
pathA.mind: The Sky Anchor. Imagine the ceiling or sky above you lifting by ten feet. Breathe into that new space.
pathA.social: Recall a safe person placing a warm, gentle hand on your back to help share the load.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels like it's closing in. Goal: Define the Edges.
pathB.body: Clench your fists as tight as you can for 3 seconds, then release. Feel the blood return to your fingers.
pathB.mind: Object Naming. Find three hard, unmoving objects in the room and whisper their names.
pathB.social: Text a 'shield' emoji 🛡️ to a safe person to signal you are holding heavy weight.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Static
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel like static. Your system is receiving too much conflicting 'signal' to process, so it has turned everything into a protective white noise.
pathB.blueprint: Neural Interference. Your sympathetic (Red) and dorsal (Blue) systems are firing so rapidly that they are cancelling each other out, leaving you in a buzzing haze.
pathB.physicalSensation: A 'fuzzy' or vibrating feeling in the brain and skin; pixelated vision; and a sense that your focus is constantly jumping.
pathB.metaphor: An old television tuned to a dead channel. A screen full of buzzing black-and-white dots—lots of energy, but no clear picture.
pathB.theImpulse: To stare into space, rub your head, and wait for the 'picture' of reality to clear.
pathB.superpower: Information Filtering. Your system is muting a chaotic world so that you don't have to process the painful details of this moment.
pathB.generalGoal: Tuning the dial. Finding one clear frequency.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel fuzzy and fragmented internally. Goal: Vocal Tuning.
pathA.body: Make a low, long 'Mmmmmm' sound. Feel the vibration in your lips and chest.
pathA.mind: Focus on the rhythm of your own heartbeat. Don't judge it; just listen to the 'thump-thump'.
pathA.social: Recall one song you know the lyrics to. Hum the very first line.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world looks like a blurry, buzzing mess. Goal: Sharp Focus.
pathB.body: Pick up a small object with a distinct texture (a stone, a pen, a coin) and roll it between your palms.
pathB.mind: The Detail Hunt. Find the smallest text in the room (on a book spine or label) and try to read it.
pathB.social: Focus on the furthest sound you can hear outside the building (a car, a bird).

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Locked
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel locked. You are in a 'biological' stalemate where your body has decided that any movement at all is too dangerous to attempt.
pathB.blueprint: Rigid Immobilization. The nervous system has increased muscle spindle sensitivity to the maximum. You are 'braced' for an impact that hasn't ended yet.
pathB.physicalSensation: A locked jaw; stiff neck; and joints that feel like they have been fused. You may feel like you are 'trapped' inside a suit of stone.
pathB.metaphor: A high-security vault that has gone into lockdown mode. The doors are bolted, and the code has been temporarily wiped from the system.
pathB.theImpulse: To hold your breath, to grit your teeth, and to wait for a 'key' or a sign of safety to arrive.
pathB.superpower: Impenetrability. In this state, nothing can get in to hurt you. You have created an absolute boundary that the outside world cannot cross.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are a prisoner of your own tension. Goal: Internal Lubrication.
pathA.body: Stick out your tongue as far as it will go, then bring it back in. Repeat 3 times to unlock the throat.
pathA.mind: Imagine a warm oil being poured over your shoulders, slowly melting the 'lock'.
pathA.social: Visualize a safe person handing you a key. You don't have to use it yet, just hold it.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a cage. Goal: Testing the Perimeter.
pathB.body: Gently push your tongue against the inside of your teeth. Feel the boundary of your mouth.
pathB.mind: Find one 'open' thing in the room (an open door, a gap between books, a cup).
pathB.social: If safe, ask a person or pet to sit near you but *not* touch you. Feel the safety of the gap.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Compressed
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel compressed. Your system is trying to pack all of your energy into a tiny, dense core to keep it from leaking out or being detected.
pathB.blueprint: High-Density Freeze. A state of intense internal pressure where the 'volume' of your life-force has been turned down to a single, concentrated point.
pathB.physicalSensation: A feeling of 'tightness' in the skin; a sense that your internal organs are being squeezed together; and very short, clipped breaths.
pathB.metaphor: A spring that has been pushed down as far as it can go. It takes up very little space, but it is vibrating with potential energy.
pathB.theImpulse: To stay small, to talk in a whisper, and to keep your elbows tucked tightly into your sides.
pathB.superpower: Concentrated Power. You are currently at your most 'dense'. When this compression eventually releases, it will provide a massive burst of mobilizing energy.
pathB.generalGoal: Releasing the spring—one coil at a time.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel 'packed in' and stifled. Goal: Micro-Exhale.
pathA.body: Exhale through your nose with a soft 'hiss' sound, as long as you can. Feel the pressure drop slightly.
pathA.mind: Imagine your internal 'point' of energy getting just a tiny bit wider, like a ripple in a pond.
pathA.social: Say one word out loud. Any word. Just to feel the air leave your throat.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels too small for you. Goal: Expanding the Room.
pathB.body: Place your hands on your thighs and slowly slide them toward your knees, feeling the length of your legs.
pathB.mind: Count how many steps it would take to walk to the other side of the room.
pathB.social: Look at a window and acknowledge the vast space that exists outside the walls.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Constricted
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel constricted. Your system is tightening its grip to prevent any 'leakage' of energy that might be detected. You are a biological fortress holding its breath.
pathB.blueprint: Vaso-constrictive Freeze. A low-mobilization trap where the body narrows its focus and physical presence to the absolute minimum to survive a perceived threat.
pathB.physicalSensation: A tight band around the chest; a 'closed' throat; and a feeling of being squeezed from all sides by an invisible force.
pathB.metaphor: An airlock that has been sealed shut. There is just enough air to survive, but no room for anything else to enter or leave.
pathB.theImpulse: To swallow repeatedly, to pull your shoulders to your ears, and to minimize your breathing.
pathB.superpower: Ductile Resilience. Even when squeezed to your limit, your core remains intact. You are proving your ability to endure under pressure.
pathB.generalGoal: Micro-expansion. Finding one thin straw of air.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel an internal 'clamping' down. Goal: Soften the Throat.
pathA.body: Gently flutter your lips (like a horse 'brrr') for 3 seconds. This vibrates the vagus nerve in the throat to break the constriction.
pathA.mind: Visualize your lungs as two balloons that are allowed to expand just one millimeter wider.
pathA.social: Imagine a safe person whispering: 'You are allowed to breathe now.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The air in the room feels 'thin' or tight. Goal: External Volume.
pathB.body: Look at the furthest corner of the room. Acknowledge that there is a lot of space out there, even if you don't feel it yet.
pathB.mind: Count the number of open spaces in the room (doorways, window panes, gaps).
pathB.social: Text a 'cloud' emoji ☁️ to a safe person to signal you need more 'air' or space.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Rigid
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel rigid. Your muscles have turned into 'armor' to protect your vitals. You are biologically mimicking the safety of a stone.
pathB.blueprint: Tonic Immobility. A high-tension trap where the muscles are fully 'loaded' but the 'Go' signal is blocked by a massive 'Stop' command.
pathB.physicalSensation: Limbs that feel like wood or cold metal; a stiff neck that won't turn; and a 'plank-like' feeling in the core.
pathB.metaphor: A knight in a suit of armor that has rusted shut. The strength is there, but the movement is gone.
pathB.theImpulse: To stay perfectly still, to hide your hands, and to keep your eyes fixed on the 'threat'.
pathB.superpower: Stony Defense. You have become a hard target. In this state, your system is maximizing its physical durability to survive an impact.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel 'bolted' internally. Goal: Joint Lubrication.
pathA.body: Slowly roll just your wrists in a tiny circle. If they are locked, just imagine them moving in a circle.
pathA.mind: Think of the word 'Pliable'. Let the word repeat like a soft mantra.
pathA.social: Visualize yourself 'un-armoring' in a warm, safe room, piece by piece.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a physical wall. Goal: Tactile Softness.
pathB.body: Find the softest thing near you (clothing, hair, a cushion) and touch it with just your fingertips.
pathB.mind: Identify one object in the room that is currently moving (a clock hand, a leaf outside).
pathB.social: If safe, ask a person or pet to sit nearby without touching you. Feel the safety of the gap.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Seized
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel seized. Your system has 'seized the gears' to prevent a catastrophic breakdown. It is a protective emergency halt.
pathB.blueprint: Neural Gridlock. The high-energy sympathetic drive and the high-energy dorsal shutdown have collided, stalling the engine completely.
pathB.physicalSensation: A sharp, sudden 'stop' in the body; wide, fixed eyes; and a feeling of internal 'screeching' that results in no movement.
pathB.metaphor: A car engine that has run out of oil and fused its parts together. The power was there, but the friction became too much.
pathB.theImpulse: To gasp and hold it, to stare with 'dinner-plate' eyes, and to stay in a state of shock.
pathB.superpower: The Emergency Brake. You have successfully stopped a dangerous escalation by pulling the plug on all movement. You are safe in the stall.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Your internal engine is 'stalled' and hot. Goal: Rhythmic Reset.
pathA.body: Tap your own chest gently in a 1-2, 1-2 heartbeat rhythm for 15 seconds.
pathA.mind: State one fact about the present: 'I am in [Location]. The time is [Time].'
pathA.social: Imagine a safe person saying your name in a very calm, steady voice.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels like a startling 'flash'. Goal: Visual Grounding.
pathB.body: Blink your eyes rapidly 5 times. This forces the visual system to 'refresh' the data feed.
pathB.mind: Find one object that is completely neutral—neither good nor bad—and stare at it for 10 seconds.
pathB.social: Reach out and touch a solid, cold surface (like a table leg) to 'ground' the shock.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Gridlocked
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you feel gridlocked. You have an enormous amount of energy ready to fight or flee, but the 'gates' are locked tight. You are a volcano with the lid on.
pathB.blueprint: Active Sympathetic-Dorsal Conflict. You are at the maximum point of 'Mobilized Immobility'. You are ready to explode, but you are choosing to implode instead for safety.
pathB.physicalSensation: Extreme internal pressure; a pounding in the ears; vibrating muscles; and a feeling that you might 'burst' if you move an inch.
pathB.metaphor: A city intersection where four lanes of traffic have met in the middle and no one can move. The horns are honking, but everything is stuck.
pathB.theImpulse: To scream into a pillow, to clench every muscle until you shake, or to 'bolt' blindly.
pathB.superpower: Infinite Potential. You are holding a massive amount of power right now. When it is safe to release it, you will be capable of incredible action.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: The internal pressure is at the 'red line'. Goal: The Vocal Vent.
pathA.body: Exhale through your mouth with a low 'Hummmm' sound until you are completely empty. Repeat 3 times.
pathA.mind: Visualize a pressure gauge slowly moving out of the red and back into the orange.
pathA.social: Write one word that describes the 'horror' on a scrap of paper and crumple it up.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels like a trigger for explosion. Goal: Mechanical Discharge.
pathB.body: Press your palms together as hard as you can for 5 seconds, then drop them. Let the 'push' leave your body.
pathB.mind: Count 5 things in the room that are made of wood. Focus on the 'solid' grain.
pathB.social: If safe, ask a person or pet for a 'High-Five' or a firm hand-squeeze to discharge the gridlock.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

pathB.title: Shaking
pathB.validation: It makes sense that you are shaking. This is your body's attempt to discharge a massive amount of trapped survival energy. It is the beginning of the 'thaw'.
pathB.blueprint: The Freeze-Thaw transition. Your system is finally moving the high-voltage Red energy that was locked under the Blue brake.
pathB.physicalSensation: Involuntary tremors, chattering teeth, or a feeling of internal vibration or 'shivering' without being cold.
pathB.metaphor: A pressure valve finally whistling as the steam begins to escape. The water is still hot, but the pressure is dropping.
pathB.theImpulse: To hide the shaking, to freeze harder, or to feel 'out of control'.
pathB.superpower: The Great Discharge. Shaking is the 'Master Key' your nervous system uses to unlock itself and return to life.
pathB.generalGoal: Allowing the flow. Finding the container.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: The shaking feels overwhelming or scary from the inside. Goal: Grounded Vibration.
pathA.body: Stand against a wall and push with your hands. Let the shaking happen while feeling the solid support of the building.
pathA.mind: Vocal Matching. Make a low 'Vooooo' sound to match the frequency of the shaking.
pathA.social: Mirroring. If with a safe person, have them gently shake their hands with you so you aren't 'doing it alone'.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You feel detached from the shaking, like it's happening to someone else. Goal: Re-connecting the Edges.
pathB.body: The Container. Wrap yourself tightly in a blanket or give yourself a very firm 'self-hug' to feel your physical boundaries.
pathB.mind: Counting the Beats. Try to count the rhythm of the tremors for 10 seconds. Is it fast or slow?
pathB.social: Silent Witness. Ask a safe person to just sit with you and watch the process without trying to 'fix' it.

pathB.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary.

intensityTheory.zoneName: Tired but Wired (The Freeze / The Trap)
intensityTheory.sensations: Shaking, Gridlocked, Seized, Rigid, Constricted, Compressed, Locked, Static, Buried, Paralyzed
intensityTheory.emotions: Terrified, Trapped, Fragmented, Invisible, Numb, Dissociated
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel terrified. Your system is doing exactly what it was designed to do to survive a worst-case scenario.
intensityTheory.blueprint: You have stepped into the biological trap. Your system perceives an inescapable threat so that it has pressed the gas pedal (Red) and the emergency brake (Blue) at the exact same time.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Externally, you look completely still, or spaced out, but internally, your heart is pounding and your muscles are braced. It is the sensation of being 'tired but wired'.
intensityTheory.metaphor: An engine revving at 7,000 RPM while the wheels are locked in concrete, or a high-pressure pipe with all the valves welded shut.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To completely freeze, stop breathing, or disconnect from your body.
intensityTheory.superpower: The ultimate pain-killer. Your nervous system immobilized you so you would not draw the attention of a predator, while simultaneously flooding you with endorphins so you won't feel the pain of an inescapable attack.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Sensory ignition. Micro-sparks only. Discharge the Lock. Do not try to relax or use logic. You must mechanically burn off the chemical lock to release the brake.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Your body is locked in high muscular tension, fighting its own internal adrenaline dump. Goal: Physical Discharge.
pathA.body: The Shake. Stand up (or stay seated) and vigorously shake your hands, arms, legs, and torso for 60 seconds. (Animals do this naturally after a threat passes).
pathA.mind: The Exhale Hum. Take a deep breath and make a low, deep, vibrating 'Vooooo' or humming sound until you are completely out of air.
pathA.social: Silent Connection. Look at a photo of a trusted person or pet. Acknowledge their existence without needing anything from you right now.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are the 'deer in headlights,' terrified and frozen by an external threat. Goal: Auditory Orienting.
pathB.body: Cut the Visual. Close your eyes or cover them with your hands.
pathB.mind: Sound Anchoring. With your eyes closed, focus 100% of your attention on finding one safe, rhythmic sound in the room.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse. If you are with someone in the Purple Zone: Do not demand eye contact. Sit quietly beside them.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Purple Zone can feel scary. As the 'Freeze' melts, you will likely feel the 'Fight/Flight' (Red) agitation that was trapped underneath.

intensityTheory.sensations: Hibernating, Immobilized, Hollow, Empty, Deflated, Frozen, Shutdown, Numb, Drained, Lethargic
intensityTheory.emotions: Despairing, Hopeless, Desolate, Spent, Drained, Despondent, Depressed, Sullen, Exhausted
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel shut down or depleted. Your body is in energy-conserving stasis.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Everything feels voided out, senses numb, motivation evaporated.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A profound, immovable heaviness, a drop in body temperature, or the literal feeling of an empty chest cavity.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A dried-up riverbed where everything has gone dormant to survive the cold.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To fade away, become completely invisible, and detach.
intensityTheory.superpower: Total metabolic conservation. Your system masterfully strips away all excess to preserve core vitality.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Sensory ignition. Micro-sparks only. No heavy cognitive lifting when the tank is completely empty.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel consumed by an internal void, a crushing heaviness, or total depletion. Goal: Pull OUT to the world.
pathA.body: Friction Spark. Press your palms together firmly and feel the heat generate between them.
pathA.mind: Visual Tether. Name 3 things in the room that have the same color.
pathA.social: Silent Connection. Look at a photo of a trusted person or pet.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You perceive a drained, colorless world. You are spaced out, foggy, or staring blankly. Goal: Pull IN to the body.
pathB.body: Sensory Shock. Take three sharp, fast inhales through the nose, or splash cold water on your face/wrists.
pathB.mind: Internal Tracing. Close your eyes and mentally trace the shape of your right hand.
pathB.social: The Container. Place your right hand firmly on your left shoulder, and your left hand on your right shoulder (a self-hug).

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary. As the 'Freeze' melts, you will likely feel the 'Fight/Flight' (Red) agitation.

intensityTheory.sensations: Disconnected, Collapsed, Withdrawn, Sinking, Exhausted, Fading, Slumped, Shrinking, Heavy, Flat
intensityTheory.emotions: Alienated, Miserable, Lonely, Disheartened, Tired, Pessimistic, Morose, Discouraged, Sad, Bored
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel heavy and withdrawn. You are not lazy; your system is signaling that the cost of engaging is too high right now.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Your system is powering down. The thinking brain is flickering, and complex logic is becoming difficult.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A deep, aching heaviness in the limbs and chest. Slumped posture and mental fogginess.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A thick fog rolling in that obscures the landscape.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To cancel plans, pull the covers over your head, and avoid eye contact.
intensityTheory.superpower: Strategic retreat. Your system is intentionally dimming the lights to protect you.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Gentle Mobilization. Simple physical movements combined with simple mental focus to slowly bring the system back online.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel consumed by the internal heaviness and the urge to slump inward. Goal: Pull OUT to the world.
pathA.body: Postural Reset. Sit up straight, physically lift your chin, and roll your shoulders back.
pathA.mind: The 5-Object Anchor. Name 5 things you can see around you right now.
pathA.social: Low-Stakes Signal. Send a single emoji to a trusted friend.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The world feels muffled, distant, or overwhelming. Goal: Pull IN to the body.
pathB.body: Tactile Grounding. Rub your hands firmly up and down your thighs.
pathB.mind: Internal Pulse. Tap your finger against your leg to the exact rhythm of your own heartbeat.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse Request. Ask a safe person to simply sit near you while you read or rest.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary.

intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that your system is slowing down. Your body is simply pausing to protect its resources.
intensityTheory.blueprint: A mild energy drop, gently turning down your metabolic rate. Your thinking brain is still fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: A slight loss of physical sharpness, a drooping posture, and muffled senses.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A dimmer switch gently turning down the lights in a room.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sigh, step back, and passively withdraw.
intensityTheory.superpower: The pause. Allows you to stop expending energy on something that isn't working.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel the physical sluggishness. Goal: Shift the internal narrative and wake the body.
pathA.body: The Posture Signal. Stand up, stretch overhead, and take one deep, deliberate breath.
pathA.mind: Cognitive Reframing. Tell yourself out loud: 'I am hitting a speed bump, not a wall.'
pathA.social: The Casual Check-In. Send a quick message to a friend about something unrelated.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: The environment feels a bit dull. Goal: Re-anchor to the present moment.
pathB.body: Sensory Focus. Hold a warm cup of tea, focusing entirely on the physical temperature.
pathB.mind: The Curiosity Lens. Pick one mundane object and find three interesting details.
pathB.social: Listening. Ask someone nearby a simple question and focus 100% on their answer.

intensityTheory.warning: THE THAW WARNING: Leaving the Blue Zone can feel scary.

intensityTheory.sensations: Exploding, Flooded, Overloaded, Twitchy, Surging, Burning, Boiling, Clenched, Braced, Racing
intensityTheory.emotions: Enraged, Panicked, Stressed, Jittery, Shocked, Livid, Furious, Frustrated, Tense, Stunned
intensityTheory.validation: It makes sense that you feel explosive. Your body is flawlessly executing an ancient survival protocol.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Adrenaline flood. The amygdala has shut down the thinking brain to prioritize survival.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Pounding heart, rapid shallow breathing, heat in the face, clenched muscles.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A raging forest fire or a car engine redlining.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To explode, attack, scream, or immediately flee.
intensityTheory.superpower: Ultimate physical mobilization to survive a predator.
intensityTheory.generalGoal: Mechanical Braking & Energy Discharge. Use the body to cool the engine.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are consumed by intense heat and racing heart. Goal: Cool the engine.
pathA.body: Physiological Sigh. Two sharp inhales through the nose, one long exhale through the mouth.
pathA.mind: Visual Broaden. Look up and take in the far edges of the room (panoramic vision).
pathA.social: The Safe Exit. State: 'My system is running hot, I need to step away for a few minutes.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are hyper-fixated on the trigger. Goal: Break the threat-lock and discharge energy.
pathB.body: Heavy Resistance. Push against a solid wall as hard as you can for 10 seconds.
pathB.mind: Neutral Anchor. Find 5 objects of the same color and say names out loud.
pathB.social: The Vent Valve. Ask a safe person to simply listen without giving advice.

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.sensations: Volatile, Trembling, Pressurized, Vibrating, Fidgety, Pounding, Guarded, Scanning, Flushed, Prickly
intensityTheory.emotions: Fuming, Frightened, Angry, Nervous, Restless, Anxious, Apprehensive, Worried, Irritated, Annoyed
intensityTheory.validation: It makes perfect sense that you feel pressurized. Your body is gathering fuel to handle a challenge.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Rising adrenaline. Thinking brain is flickering—complex logic is difficult.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Heavy heartbeat, tight jaw, buzzing energy in the limbs.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To snap, argue, pace, or aggressively fix a problem.
intensityTheory.superpower: Focused Mobilization to decisively handle a challenge.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You are consumed by buzzing, restless energy. Goal: Release the pressure.
pathA.body: Active Release. Shake out your hands vigorously as if flicking water off fingertips.
pathA.mind: Name to Tame. Say out loud: 'My engine is running hot right now.'
pathA.social: The Boundary Signal. State: 'I'm feeling a bit overwhelmed, need to focus on one thing at a time.'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: You are hyper-focused on an annoyance. Goal: Break the target-lock.
pathB.body: Rhythmic Pacing. Take 10 slow, deliberate steps, counting each one.
pathB.mind: Visual Shift. Name 3 things in the room that are neutral or boring.
pathB.social: The Mirror Ask. Ask a safe person to talk about something totally unrelated.

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.validation: Your body is giving you a small injection of fuel to deal with a minor challenge.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Mild fight/flight response. Thinking brain is fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Subtle tightening of shoulders or jaw, slight quickening of breath.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A yellow traffic light or an engine in first gear.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To fidget, speak sharply, or overthink.
intensityTheory.superpower: The early warning system to notice a boundary violation.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: You feel subtle physical tension. Goal: Steer the narrative and use the fuel.
pathA.body: Forward Ambulation. Take a 2-minute walk to quiet the brain's threat detector.
pathA.mind: Stress is Fuel Reframe. Say: 'My body is giving me the energy I need to handle this.'
pathA.social: The Reality Check. Ask a safe person: 'Am I reading this situation right?'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Hyper-focusing on a minor annoyance. Goal: Right-size the problem.
pathB.body: The Exhale Focus. Take a breath in, and extend the exhale to be longer than inhale.
pathB.mind: The Empathy Pivot. Invent one benign, harmless reason for someone's annoying behavior.
pathB.social: The Collaborative Ask. State: 'I'm finding this a bit frustrating—can we brainstorm a different way?'

intensityTheory.warning: What do you want to achieve? Do you want to use the energy? Then steer to yellow. Do you want to relax? Calm down into green.

intensityTheory.sensations: Slowing, Grounded, Quiet, Warm, Still, Loose, Steady, Stable, Settled, Light
intensityTheory.emotions: Sleepy, Complacent, Tranquil, Cozy, Serene, Mellow, Thoughtful, Peaceful, Comfortable, Carefree
intensityTheory.validation: Your nervous system is performing critical repairs and refilling your body budget.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Vagal Brake is fully engaged. Body is in physiological safety.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Pleasant heaviness, unclenched muscles, effortless breathing.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A high-performance car parked in the garage for a tune-up.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sleep, cuddle, reflect, or simply exist.
intensityTheory.superpower: Deep Restoration. Biologically building structural capacity to handle future stress.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Savoring internal stillness. Goal: Deep Rest & Repair.
pathA.body: Conscious Surrender (NSDR). Do a 10-minute body scan.
pathA.mind: Savoring the Baseline. Explicitly memorize the feeling: 'This is what safety feels like.'
pathA.social: Safe Solitude. Give yourself permission to be alone without guilt.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Feeling tranquil and safe in environment. Goal: Deep Connection.
pathB.body: Regulating Touch. Cuddle a pet or wrap yourself in a heavy blanket.
pathB.mind: The Gratitude Anchor. Recognize why you are grateful for something nearby.
pathB.social: The Lighthouse. Offer your calm presence to someone else without talking.

intensityTheory.sensations: Resting, Calm, Restoring, Present, Balanced, Smooth, Anchored, Satisfied, Expanding, Softening
intensityTheory.emotions: Relaxed, Chill, Restful, Blessed, Balanced, Calm, Secure, Satisfied, Grateful, Touched
intensityTheory.validation: Your environment is safe; your system is down-shifting to prepare for connection.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Transitioning to safety. Heart rate is slowing; social engagement is coming online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Muscles unclenching, posture relaxing, open engagement.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A ship dropping anchor in a calm harbor.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To sigh in relief, smile gently, or appreciate the environment.
intensityTheory.superpower: Co-Regulation. You have the power to help others feel calm just by being in the room.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Enjoying internal calm, want to gently connect. Goal: Gentle External Connection.
pathA.body: The Half-Smile. Intentionally create a gentle 'Mona Lisa' smile.
pathA.mind: Savoring the Shift. Mentally name three things in your body that feel 'not wrong.'
pathA.social: The Casual Bid. Make a low-stakes observation to someone nearby.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Feeling open-hearted and engaged. Goal: Deepen the Social Anchor.
pathB.body: The Extended Exhale. Let the exhale be longer than the inhale.
pathB.mind: Hunting for Glimmers. Find one tiny specific detail that brings micro-joy.
pathB.social: Prosodic Listening. Focus on the melodic tone of a human voice.

intensityTheory.emotions: At Ease, Easygoing, Content, Loving, Fulfilled
intensityTheory.validation: Your nervous system has assessed you are safe. You are mastering your gears.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Deceleration. Amygdala is quiet; prefrontal cortex is fully online.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Momentum slowing without crashing. Grounded feet, rhythmic breathing.
intensityTheory.metaphor: Shifting off a busy highway onto a scenic neighborhood road.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To look around the room and take a deep clarifying breath.
intensityTheory.superpower: Smooth Transitions. Clarity to purposefully choose your next move.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Feeling the internal shift of engine slowing. Goal: Deepen the Anchor.
pathA.body: The Gravity Check. Press your feet into the floor and feel the support.
pathA.mind: The Transition Label. Tell yourself: 'I am safely shifting gears.'
pathA.social: The Inner Circle. Spend 30 seconds visualizing the face of a secure person.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Highly present in environment. Goal: Active Appreciation.
pathB.body: Visual Broadening. Let your eyes wander and rest on whatever is naturally pleasing.
pathB.mind: Micro-Gratitude. Identify one small thing that is working perfectly.
pathB.social: The Just Because Bid. Send a quick message to a friend requiring no response.

intensityTheory.sensations: Widening, Lifted, Bubbling, Electric, Soaring, Buzzing, Bright, Pulsing, Flowing, Buoyant
intensityTheory.emotions: Surprised, Upbeat, Festive, Exhilarated, Ecstatic, Hyper, Cheerful, Motivated, Inspired, Elated
intensityTheory.validation: Your body has successfully married peak energy with profound safety.
intensityTheory.blueprint: The ultimate hybrid state: high-octane energy with the safety circuit firmly engaged.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Buzzing electric energy, weightlessness, wide and bright eyes.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A race car on an open track or a surfer on a massive wave.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To create, celebrate, and lose yourself in a challenging task.
intensityTheory.superpower: The Generative Drive. The biological home of 'Flow.'

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Bubbling internal energy, need to point at a target. Goal: Channel the Drive.
pathA.body: Dynamic Discharge. Jump, dance, or shadowbox for 60 seconds.
pathA.mind: The North Star. Declare out loud: 'I am using this energy to build [X].'
pathA.social: The Spark Bid. Share excitement: 'I have so much energy, want to go do [X]?'

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Completely absorbed in a task or project. Goal: Maintain the Safety Anchor.
pathB.body: The Smile Check. Deliberately make a genuine smile while working at speed.
pathB.mind: Friction Reframing. Say: 'This frustration is just the friction of learning.'
pathB.social: Team Flow. High-five a partner or explicitly acknowledge a shared win.

intensityTheory.sensations: Awake, Vital, Eager, Expansive, Humming, Engaged, Locked In, Glowing, Elevated, Tingling
intensityTheory.emotions: Energized, Lively, Excited, Optimistic, Enthusiastic, Pleased, Focused, Happy, Proud, Thrilled
intensityTheory.validation: Your body is providing fuel to pursue your goals and interact safely.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Steady stream of dopamine. Prefrontal cortex is fully online for deep work.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Physical readiness, upright posture, heart rate elevated but steady.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A sailor catching a perfect steady wind.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To build, learn, focus deeply, and collaborate.
intensityTheory.superpower: Sustained Generative Drive. Motivation fueled by creation, not survival.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Internal drive, humming with optimism. Goal: Apply the Drive.
pathA.body: The Posture of Pride. Stand tall, lift your chest, take an energizing breath.
pathA.mind: The Get To Reframe. List three things you 'get to' do with this energy.
pathA.social: The Enthusiasm Share. Reach out to a friend to share good news or a win.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Highly absorbed and dialed in. Goal: Sustain the Flow.
pathB.body: Rhythmic Movement. Pacing while thinking or squeezing a stress ball.
pathB.mind: The Micro-Milestone. Break task into tiny goal; acknowledge when complete.
pathB.social: Collaborative Building. Ask someone for input or brainstorm together.

intensityTheory.validation: Your body is providing a safe, low-dose spark to explore and learn.
intensityTheory.blueprint: Vagal brake released slightly. Social engagement looking for fun.
intensityTheory.physicalSensation: Light bubbling in the chest, lifting posture, urge to explore.
intensityTheory.metaphor: A puppy waking from a nap and noticing a favorite toy.
intensityTheory.theImpulse: To joke, ask a curious question, or gently engage.
intensityTheory.superpower: Curiosity & Micro-Play. State for tinkering without pressure.

pathA.title: Path A: Stuck Inside
pathA.goal: Hopeful swelling of energy inside. Goal: Express the Spark.
pathA.body: The Light Bounce. Tap feet to a beat or gently bounce on toes.
pathA.mind: The What If? Game. Ask: 'What if I tried this task in a new way?'
pathA.social: The Playful Bid. Send a funny meme or share a curious thought.

pathB.title: Path B: Stuck Outside
pathB.goal: Drawn to something fun or vibrant. Goal: Engage Curiosity.
pathB.body: Tactile Tinkering. Manipulate a physical object while you think.
pathB.mind: Sensory Savoring. Notice three visually pleasing things in environment.
pathB.social: The Curious Question. Ask someone: 'What are you most excited about today?'
